changes.value: Test in swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/files/shared_utils.rs:1414 panics: "Should be able to read file with ./ relative path". The secure file access logic fails to handle relative paths starting with "./".
Fix test_secure_file_access_read_relative_paths - panics with 'Should be able to read file with ./ relative path'
